Dividend ETFs suffer sharpest daily drop in two weeks as companies cut payouts
Surprising Analyst 12-Month Target For The WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Dividend Fund ETF

holdings.infoBox: DON is an equity ETF with a total of 295 individual holdings. The top holdings are Franklin Resources stock at 1.44%, Viatris at 1.30%, Best Buy Co. at 1.25%, APA Corporation at 1.01%, and Stanley Black & Decker at 0.97%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Dividend Fund (DON) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree US MidCap Dividend index. The fund tracks a dividend-selected and -weighted index of mid-cap stocks. DON was launched on Jun 16, 2006 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Dividend Fund Ranked Top Smart Beta ETF
data.text: The WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Dividend Fund is the only US Dividend Smart Beta ETF rated as “Best” this week. Q.ai has also recognized 5 as “Good” and 4 as “Caution.

data.title: Dividend ETFs to watch as the hunt for yield continues
data.text: Jeremy Schwartz of WisdomTree Asset Management, Bryon Lake of J.P. Morgan Asset Management and Tom Lydon of ETF Trends talk their top dividend strategies with CNBC's Bob Pisani.

data.title: Dividend ETFs suffer sharpest daily drop in two weeks as companies cut payouts
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to dividends slumped Thursday as more companies reported cutting their dividends or considering doing so, to conserve cash for operations.

data.title: New ETF themes for the 2020 decade
data.text: John Davi, Astoria Portfolio Advisors, and Armando Senra, BlackRock iShares Americas head, joins 'ETF Edge' to discuss the transports ETFs to watch during the trade war.
